devdoc.details: Protocol for transparent logging, explainability, and verification of decisions made by autonomous agents.

challengeDecision(uint256).details: Allows any user or governing body to challenge an agent's decision.

params._id: The ID of the decision to challenge.

constructor.details: Sets the deployer as the initial governance/DAO role.

getDecision(uint256).details: Retrieves the full details of a decision.

returns._0: The Decision struct containing all properties.

logDecision(string,string,uint256,string.details: Log a decision made by an autonomous agent.

params._amount: Any numeric value or token amount associated with the decision.

returns._0: id The unique ID of the logged decision.

resolveDispute(uint256,bool).details: Resolves a challenged decision. Only callable by the governance role.

params._upheld: True if the challenge was upheld (agent was wrong/overridden), false if rejected (agent was right).

transferGovernance(address).details: Allows updating the governance role (e.g., transferring control to a DAO).

params._newGovernance: The address of the new governance contract/wallet.

for transparent logging, explainability, and verification of decisions made by autonomous agents.","kind":"dev","methods":{"challengeDecision(uint256)":{"details":"Allows any user or governing body to challenge an agent's decision.","params":{"_id":"The ID of the decision to challenge."}},"constructor":{"details":"Sets the deployer as the initial governance/DAO devdoc.details: A simple DAO designed to govern the AgentAuditLogger protocol.  Allows DAO members to vote on challenged agent decisions and resolve them transparently.

params._decisionId: The decision ID being voted on.
params._voteUpheld: True means "I agree with the Challenger. Agent is wrong."                    False means "I disagree with Challenger. Agent is right."

challengeAndInitiateVote(uint256).details: Allows a DAO member to directly challenge a decision and immediately start the voting process.

constructor.details: Initialize DAO with the logger and add deployer as first member

executeResolution(uint256).details: Execute the result of the vote and call resolveDispute on the Logger. Can be called by anyone once the voting period has ended.

initiateDisputeVote(uint256).details: Start a vote to resolve a challenged decision. Starts a 3-day voting window.

devdoc.title: AgentDAO
